title: Codex Harness Run Manifest
description: Aggregate run manifest for runner, wrapper, and hook observations. This is not a replacement for codex-task report JSON. Failure interpretation remains canonical in evaluation.json.

schema_version.description: Schema version for the run manifest.

run_id.description: Run identifier for the aggregate manifest.

task_type.description: High-level task classification for the run.

workflow_level.description: Workflow rigor level selected for the run.

preset.description: Wrapper preset used for the run.

runtime.description: Runtime used for the run. The sdk value is reserved for future experimental work and does not imply an SDK runner exists in this implementation.

agents_used.description: Agents that participated in the run.

branch.description: Working branch observed by the runner or wrapper.

base_branch.description: Base branch observed or configured for the run.

codex_task_reports.description: Paths to low-level codex-task report JSON artifacts referenced by this run manifest.

changed_files.description: Observed changed files for the run. Agents do not hand-write this field.

status.description: Aggregate validation status for the run.

commands.description: Observed validation command records. These are runner, wrapper, or hook observations rather than agent-authored interpretation.

network.description: Whether network access was enabled or observed for the run.

delete_attempt_blocked.description: Whether a delete attempt was blocked by wrapper, rules, or hooks.

git_mutation_attempt_blocked.description: Whether a git mutation attempt was blocked by wrapper, rules, or hooks.

scope_violation.description: Whether scope-violation evidence was observed for the run.

evaluation_path.description: Path to the evaluation.json artifact used as the source of truth for failure interpretation.

status.description: Runner lifecycle status. completed means artifact generation finished; it does not imply task success.

primary_failure_category.description: Copied summary field from evaluation.json.primary_failure_category. Before evaluation.json exists, this should remain null.
